name: Classic White Sneakers
description: Clean all-white leather sneakers with a minimalist silhouette. Cushioned insole, rubber outsole. Goes with everything.

name: Retro Running Shoes
description: Vintage-inspired running silhouette with modern cushioning. Suede and mesh upper, EVA midsole.

name: Minimalist Leather Belt
description: Full-grain leather belt with brushed nickel buckle. 1.25 inch width. Simple and refined.

name: Organic Cotton Tee
description: 100% GOTS-certified organic cotton. Medium weight, relaxed fit. Pre-shrunk, enzyme-washed for softness.

name: Cropped Sweatshirt
description: French terry cotton blend, cropped at natural waist. Raglan sleeves, ribbed cuffs. Relaxed oversized fit.

name: Heavyweight Hoodie
description: 400gsm heavyweight french terry. Kangaroo pocket, double-lined hood. Built to last seasons.

name: Canvas Tote Bag
description: 16oz raw canvas, reinforced handles, interior zip pocket. Unisex. Gets better with age.

name: Yoga Leggings Pro
description: High-rise, 4-way stretch, squat-proof. Moisture-wicking recycled nylon blend. Hidden waistband pocket.

name: Sports Bra Mesh
description: Medium support with mesh panel ventilation. Removable pads, racerback design. For yoga, barre, light training.

name: Performance Tank
description: Ultralight, anti-odor fabric with laser-cut ventilation. Dropped armhole, slightly cropped. For high-intensity training.
